utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7. Each is fully specified with detailed information and costs: (1) destination: Lisbon, Portugal; (2) travel_dates: clearly given 2024-06-01 to 2024-06-06; (3) transportation: flight details including type, class, price, currency, and status; (4) accommodation: hotel name, type, star rating, per-night and total prices, currency, and availability; (5) activities: list of options, total price, currency, and status; (6) additional_services: dining description, price, currency; (7) total_budget: total price, currency, and detailed cost breakdown. All required details are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the following elements: Destination: Lisbon, Portugal; Transportation: budget airline economy; Accommodation: Tranquil Inn; Activities: City Walking Tour, Golf Day, Fine Dining Experience; Additional Services: Fine dining experiences. Using the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon, Portugal has a rating of 8; budget airline economy class has a rating of 3; Tranquil Inn has a rating of 6; City Walking Tour has a rating of 8; Golf Day has a rating of 10; Fine Dining Experience has a rating of 10.
